title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; no API keys needed.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama; Kotlin-friendly, reactive streams, Spring Boot starters available.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers questions using any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models, written in Rust; supports themes & keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama-exporter
summary: Prometheus exporter that scrapes Ollama’s REST API for model, token, and latency metrics.

title: ollama-nuxt-chat
summary: Nuxt 3 starter that streams Ollama responses server-side and renders them in a clean chat UI.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go client for Ollama; small surface, idiomatic error handling.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server using Bolt JS and Ollama; thread-aware conversations.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or rankers in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or chat about your notes offline.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama; tokio-based with serde schemas for every endpoint.

title: ollama-model-gallery
summary: Curated list of community-tuned GGUF models ready to pull via Ollama with benchmarks & prompts.
